general.title: UTAG Clustering [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions:
Discover spatial tissue domains (tissue micro‑environments) by combining phenotypes (feature intensities) and spatial proximity of cells with UTAG (Unsupervised discovery of Tissue Architecture by Graph message passing). Clusters are stored in the analysis as the annotation “UTAG”.\
Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Table to Process
parameters.description: Source table to perform the computation. The default value "Original" will use the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Features
parameters.description: List specific features for clustering. Default "All" will use all features

parameters.name: Slide Annotation
parameters.description: Name of the annotation column that identifies each image/slide. Default is "None" if not applicable.

parameters.name: PCA Components
parameters.description: Number of principal components to keep. Default is "None" to skip PCA (good for small datasets).

parameters.name: K-Nearest Neighbors
parameters.description: Number of nearest neighbors used when building the graph for clustering.

parameters.name: Resolution Parameter
parameters.description: Higher values give more, smaller clusters; lower values give fewer, larger clusters.

parameters.name: Distance Threshold
parameters.description: How far (in micrometres) two cells can be apart and still be considered neighbors.

parameters.name: Random Seed
parameters.description: Ensures results are reproducible when re‑run the template.

parameters.name: Leiden Iterations
parameters.description: How many times the Leiden algorithm refines the clusters.

parameters.name: Output Annotation Name
parameters.description: The new column that will store the UTAG domain labels.

parameters.name: Parellel Processes
parameters.description: For multiple slides (images) and several CPU cores, split the data by Slide and run the message‑passing step for each slide in parallel. Default is False.

parameters.name: N-Jobs
parameters.description: When Parallel Processes is True,  the number of jobs to run in parallel. Default is 1.
